releaseNotes: ANMR: classify recording compatibility + show writer version in Playlist

history.notes:
ANMR: classify recording compatibility + show writer version in Playlist

Define and implement the project's ANMR compatibility policy end-to-end.

Reader side (main process):
- readFileHeader() now extracts the writer's app version from magic bytes
  5-7 into RecordingMetadata.writerVersion (still informational — the
  identity check still uses only the 5-byte prefix).
- New src/main/recording/Compatibility.ts exposes classifyCompatibility()
  which returns one of:
    - 'ok'                   format match, writer ≤ current → play normally
    - 'unknown-app-version'  format match, writer > current → play with ⚠️
    - 'legacy-format'        format < current               → legacy compat ⚠️
    - 'future-format'        format > current               → cannot play
- PlaybackEngine.load() refuses 'future-format' files with a clear error.
- RecordingFileScanner populates writerVersion / formatVersion /
  compatibility on every PlaylistEntry.

UI side (renderer):
- Playlist row displays the recorded writer version () next to
  the file date so operators can see which build produced each file.
- Non-'ok' compatibility shows an amber ⚠️ badge (UnknownVersion /
  LegacyFormat) with a tooltip explaining the implication.
- 'future-format' entries are greyed out, line-through, Ban icon, and
  both single- and double-click are disabled — they cannot be loaded.

Docs:
- CLAUDE.md gains a Compatibility Rules table that codifies the verdicts
  and the forward-looking policy: future ANMR_FORMAT_VERSION bumps must
  ship a legacy reader for the previous format, and the legacy badge is
  the user-visible signal that some newer features may be unreproducible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

v2.8.9 - macOS code signing & notarization

The macOS build is now signed with a Developer ID certificate and
notarized by Apple. The 'unidentified developer' Gatekeeper warning
no longer appears when opening the app for the first time.
Notification system (toast popups, operator announcements, critical alerts), cluster detach/rejoin UX, reset dismissed announcements, bug fixes
Fix: app failed to launch after Permanent Shutdown — bootstrap now clears sentinel file on fresh launch, preventing guardian deadlock

Fix: recording save dir overwritten by settings save. Feat: player file-not-found red banner + auto-refresh, save dir display with open-in-file-manager button. AppSettings disk persistence. Defensive validation for NIC/sACN.

Signal recording/playback, SignalFlow performance (batch draw, simplified mode), cluster promote with split-brain prevention, About/version check, diagnostic snapshot for bug reports, enriched startup logs, documentation update
About dialog, version check, bug report & feature request
Interactive tooltips, split-brain prevention on double promote
Manual Promote to PRIMARY button for cluster
Reduce GC pressure and allocations on frame hot path
Integrate Signal Checker as built-in mini-app
Reliability improvements, IPC race condition fix
Merge engine, multi-NIC, display formats, guardian mode
